summary: Excellent soundboard transfer of a November ’72 Texas show, though the setlist listing mistakenly includes Promised Land.
review: Both reviewers praise the high‑quality soundboard transfer, noting clear and balanced audio that captures the energy of the November 1972 Texas shows. The only point of contention is a setlist discrepancy – the song Promised Land appears in some sources but was not actually performed at this concert. Overall the recording is considered very listenable despite the documentation error.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong recording quality (excellent soundboard transfer) and no performance complaints earn high marks, but limited musical commentary and a setlist confusion keep the overall rating just below four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced soundboard capture; reviewers describe the transfer as great with no noted audio flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist appears correctly in performance, though documentation erroneously lists Promised Land, causing confusion among fans.
